self_correction_logic: Q1. The sample is real employees (CEOs and TMT members of 99 SMEs). Q2. The correlation matrix N is 99, representing teams/firms, which violates the individual-level requirement. Q3. They report their own network ties, but it is aggregated to the team level. Q4. The measure for 'average strength of external ties' captures the frequency of interaction, duration, and emotional intensity, which is mere communication rather than purposive boundary-spanning behavior. Q5. The variable has zero-order correlations but is also used as a moderator. Because the study is conducted at the team level and measures mere network communication frequency, it violates multiple criteria. Therefore, Code 5 applies.
reason_summary: Non-individual level (team level analysis of TMTs) and no effect size of interest (measures mere network communication frequency rather than purposive BSB).
verbatim: [Code 3 (Team Level) and Code 1 (Construct Invalidity)]. Verbatim Evidence:
